title: Astitva - Ek Prem Kahani
desc: Dr Simran, a renowned gynaecologist, marries Abhi, who is 10 years younger to her. However, her family disapproves of the match.

title: Ishq Subhan Allah
desc: Life takes a huge turn for them when Kabeer and Zara, two ardent followers of Islam who have totally opposite principles and beliefs, cross paths with each other.

title: Bhaage Re Mann
desc: Padmini returns home after 20 years for a wedding, but ends up taking care of three kids. With no parenting experience, she learns about family, love, and second chances in the most unexpected way.

title: Aadhe Adhoore
desc: Jassi, longing for her husband abroad, falls into a secret affair with her brother-in-law. Betrayal and hidden truths lead to heartbreak and a tragic end that shatters their lives.

title: Tv Ke Uss Paar
desc: Vivek is a dedicated MNC employee, but at home, his mother is consumed by television's daily soaps. Her love for these shows doesn't just entertain her, it transports her into their fictional world.
